name: Dog Fest Meat Sticks  - Lamb 45G
description: These tender and meaty treats can be torn into smaller bits as a reward for training. Something you should always have with you wherever you go with your dog. Composition: lamb, vegetable by-products, minerals. Analytical constituents, %: crude protein 23, crude fat 4.5, crude fiber 0.2, crude ash 4, moisture 23.
